race.comment: INHABIT (7) is a promising filly set to return for the Hickmott stable on the back of two smart trial wins. She was a good debut winner back in October but struggled to go on with it after that despite the obvious high stable opinion, being sent to contest strong 2YO contests in the Gold Coast. Has taken the right steps during the break and should take some beating. ZOUWIN (5) also wasted no time getting off the mark, leading all of the way at Murray Bridge back in January. Has jumped out sharply in readiness and looks an above-average filly. RUBARE (1) didn't give her rivals a sniff two back on the Heath when leading all the way to get off the mark. Couldn't repeat the dose last start but was far from disgraced. Has been freshened with 52 days, kept up to the mark with a Flemington jumpout. Claims 3kgs from the apprentice and is sure to spear forward again. DIRTY GOLD (3) and FONTALICIOUS (4) are both last-start maiden winners. Tougher here but deserves safekeeping in the placings.
